case_title: MHDC SOUTH PARK PROPERTIES LP VS. DAMION DAVIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MHDC SOUTH PARK PROPERTIES LP AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, DAMION DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210001720) AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, DAMION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MHDC SOUTH PARK PROPERTIES LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, DAMION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1321 MISSION STREET # 409 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210001720)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210001720), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MHDC SOUTH PARK PROPERTIES LP SERVED FEB-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, DAMION

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $100 PER DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 210001720) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MHDC SOUTH PARK PROPERTIES LP
